input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.3.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.6.3.4
            TITLE: the front hoop braces must be attached as near as possible to the top of the front hoop but

            CONTENT:
            rule F.6.3.4: The Front Hoop Braces must be attached as near as possible to the top of the Front Hoop but
F.6.3.4 The Front Hoop Braces must be attached as near as possible to the top of the Front Hoop but 
not more than 50 mm below the top-most surface of the Front Hoop.  See figure following

final_answer: The Front Hoop Braces must be attached as near as possible to the top of the Front Hoop but not more than 50 mm below the top-most surface of the Front Hoop.
